message:
Add testing infrastructure epic and fix bead dependencies

- Create new Testing & Observability Infrastructure epic (bd-31u)
  with 8 subtasks covering MockDevice, test fixtures, tracing,
  and E2E test harness
- Add MockDevice (bd-180) dependencies to all feature test beads
- Add E2E harness (bd-1xy) dependencies to E2E test beads
- Add test fixtures (bd-2ky) dependencies to profile import tests
- Verify dependency structure with bv (no cycles, proper DAG)

Total: 16 epics, 152 beads

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
